title: Magic Gems
description: Tap the gem that matches the princess's crown

title: Counting Crowns
description: Count the crowns and tap the right number

title: Animal Friends
description: Find the matching animal for the princess

title: Shape Castle
description: Match the shape to build the princess's castle

title: Princess Says
description: Listen to Princess and tap what she says

title: Fairy Tale Tap
description: Tap through 3 branching princess stories — Castle, Sea, Forest, Dragon, Moon and beyond!

title: Letter Bubbles
description: Pop the bubble with the matching letter

title: More or Less
description: Tap the side with more — or less! — objects

title: Star Catcher
description: Catch falling stars — 3 rounds of increasing speed, no timer stress!

title: Royal Orchestra
description: Tap instruments to play music, then copy the pattern

title: Princess Quest
description: 3 rounds of 3D running — collect 5, 6 then 7 stars as speed climbs! Steer left & right to reach the castle.

title: Pattern Princess
description: Complete the princess pattern — ABAB, AAB, ABB and ABC sequences

title: Jasmine's Magic Leaf
description: Fly the magic leaf with Princess Jasmine, dodge bananas and meet Monkey, Eagle Man and Mouse Boy! 3 rounds of rising speed.

title: Mermaid Lagoon
description: Swim freely with Ariel through a 3D underwater wonderland — meet Rapunzel on her tower, a twirling mermaid friend, the happy sun & the princess in a clamshell!

title: Mermaid Lagoon · Painted
description: Same lagoon, painted edition — hand-drawn animated Ariel, Rapunzel, friends, fish, seahorses and a gliding sea turtle! Track your 4 friends found with the progress badge.

title: Mermaid Lagoon · Pixel
description: Top-down pixel-art lagoon with undersea chiptune — tap anywhere and Ariel swims there! Collect pearls and find all four friends.

title: Tidepool Tales
description: A tiny pixel RPG — walk up to princess friends and sea creatures, they talk to you, and some of them follow you around!

title: Big & Small Magic
description: Tap the bigger or smaller princess treasure — 3 rounds from obvious to tricky!

title: Feeling Friends
description: Tap the face that shows how Princess feels — happy, sad, angry, surprised and more!

title: Opposite Kingdom
description: Find the opposite — hot/cold, day/night, big/small and more princess pairs!

title: Princess Body Parts
description: Tap the right body part — nose, eyes, knee and more! Named tiers, emoji sparkles, 11 parts.

title: Magic Adding
description: Count the princess gems and tap the right answer — learn simple addition 1+1 to 5+5!

title: Princess Hideaway
description: Where is the gem? Tap in, on, under, next to or behind — learn spatial words!

title: Rhyme Time
description: Tap the word that rhymes with the princess word — CAT rhymes with HAT!

title: Princess Sort
description: Sort princess things into the right basket — animals, sweets and flowers!

title: Royal Weather
description: Match the weather in the princess scene — sunny, rainy, snowy, cloudy, rainbow and windy!

title: Princess Whiskers
description: Royal kitty RPG — name your cat, wardrobe, talking animals, songs, day/night, crystal cave!
skill: full RPG: speech I/O, persistent bonds, quests, biomes, wardrobe, companion

title: Princess Words
description: Tap the word that matches the picture — CAT, STAR, CROWN and more! 3 tiers of sight words.

title: Colour Cauldron
description: Mix two magical potions and tap the colour they make — Red+Blue=Purple, and more!

title: Princess Pairs
description: Flip cards and find the matching princess pairs — 3 rounds from 4 to 9 pairs!

title: Princess Countdown
description: Count backwards with Princess to light the royal fireworks — tap what comes next from 10 down to 0!

title: Treasure Boat
description: Sail with Prince Eric and Kitty, tap islands to dig for treasure, and make friends with the dragon and Ursula — no fighting!

title: Left & Right
description: Tap the princess gem on the LEFT or RIGHT — 3 tiers from big labels to no labels!

title: Princess Story Order
description: Tap the story pictures in the right order — FIRST, NEXT, LAST! 9 princess sequences.

title: Princess Front & Back
description: Is the nose on the FRONT or BACK? Tap the right side for each body part — 3 tiers!

title: Princess Take Away
description: The dragon steals gems — count what's left! Learn subtraction with a friendly dragon, 3 tiers.

title: Princess Day
description: Tap what time of day the princess scene shows — morning, afternoon, evening or night!

title: Royal Animal Babies
description: Tap the baby that belongs to Mama — Duckling, Chick, Caterpillar and more! 9 rounds across 3 tiers.

title: Princess Puzzle
description: Which one doesn't belong? Tap the odd one out — animals, flowers, sweets and more! 9 royal puzzles across 3 tiers.

title: Royal Seasons
description: Tap the right season for each princess scene — Spring, Summer, Autumn or Winter! 9 rounds across 3 tiers.

title: Princess Measures
description: Tap the taller, shorter, heavier, lighter, fuller or longer princess item — 9 rounds across 3 tiers!
